steps.instruction: This protocol uses a p300 single channel and p20 single channel pipette to transfer custom volumes of master mixes to a 96-well PCR plate followed by addition of custom volumes of sample, positive control, or no-template control. Links: * [example input csv](https://opentrons-protocol-library-website.s3.amazonaws.com/custom-README-images/6401f1/Sample%2Badd%2Bexample%2Bfile_2329C_updated.csv) This protocol was developed to combine custom volumes of master mixes with custom volumes of sample, positive control, or no-template control for PCR/qPCR setup.
step 1- Transfer master mix volumes to PCR plate wells according to input data in the csv file.
step 2- Transfer sample and positive, no-template control to PCR plate wells according to input data in the csv file.
